privacy.section1Intro: At WARDIA, we are committed to protecting your privacy. This policy describes how we collect, use, and protect your personal information when you use our financial management application.
section1List: Account information: Name, email address, phone number
Financial information: Bank account data, cards, transactions
Usage information: How you interact with our application
Device information: Device type, operating system, unique identifiers
section2List: Provide and improve our financial management services
Personalize your experience in the application
Send important notifications about your account
Comply with legal and regulatory requirements
privacy.section3Intro: We implement enterprise-level security measures to protect your information:
privacy.section4Intro: We do not sell or share your personal information with third parties for marketing purposes. We only share information when:
section4List: It is necessary to process transactions or provide services
Required by law or court order
It is necessary to protect our rights or security
section5List: Request deletion of your account and data
Export your data in a readable format
Object to the processing of your data
Withdraw your consent at any time
privacy.section6Text: We use cookies and similar technologies to improve your experience, remember your preferences, and analyze application usage. You can control cookie usage through your browser settings.
privacy.section7Text: We retain your personal information while your account is active or as necessary to provide you with services. You can request deletion of your account at any time through the application settings.
privacy.section8Text: We may update this privacy policy occasionally. We will notify you of significant changes through a notice in the application or by email.
privacy.section9Text: If you have questions about this privacy policy or how we handle your data, contact us at:

terms.section1Text: By accessing and using WARDIA ("the Application"), you agree to be bound by these Terms and Conditions. If you do not agree with any part of these terms, you should not use the Application.
terms.section2Intro: WARDIA is a personal financial management application that allows you to:
section2List: Manage your bank accounts and cards
Receive notifications about payments and due dates
terms.section3Intro: To use WARDIA, you must create an account by providing accurate and complete information. You are responsible for:
section3List: Maintaining the confidentiality of your password
All activities that occur under your account
Immediately notifying us of any unauthorized use
Keeping your contact information up to date
terms.section4Intro: You agree to use WARDIA only for lawful purposes. You must not:
section4List: Attempt to access systems or data without authorization
Interfere with the operation of the Application
Use the Application for fraudulent activities
terms.section5Intro: WARDIA allows you to enter and store financial information. Please note that:
section5List: You are responsible for the accuracy of the information you provide
The Application is a management tool, not financial advice
We are not responsible for financial decisions made based on the Application's information
You should verify important information directly with your financial institutions
terms.section6Text: All content, features, and functionality of WARDIA are owned by WARDIA and are protected by copyright, trademark, and other intellectual property laws.
terms.section7Intro: To the maximum extent permitted by law, WARDIA will not be liable for:
section7List: Loss of profits, data, or use
Financial decisions made based on the Application's information
terms.section8Text: We reserve the right to modify, suspend, or discontinue any part of WARDIA at any time, with or without prior notice. We will not be liable to you or third parties for any modification, suspension, or discontinuation of the service.
terms.section9Intro: We may terminate or suspend your access to WARDIA immediately, without prior notice, if:
section9List: You violate these Terms and Conditions
Your use jeopardizes the security of the Application
terms.section9Text: You can close your account at any time through the Application settings.
terms.section10Text: These Terms will be governed and interpreted in accordance with the laws of Peru, without giving effect to any principles of conflicts of law.
terms.section11Text: We reserve the right to update these Terms and Conditions at any time. We will notify you of significant changes through a notice in the Application or by email. Your continued use of WARDIA after such changes constitutes your acceptance of the new terms.
terms.section12Text: If you have questions about these Terms and Conditions, contact us at:
